subject: Re: Sourcing Request: Schlumberger (USA)
content:
Hi Ramy we accept your offer you will get the product with 14400 DZDZ
Envoyé de mon iPhone

> Le 13 avr. 2026 à 20:57, procurement.solutions259@gmail.com a écrit :
> 
> ﻿ Subject: Request for Competitive Pricing Quotation for 500 High Pressure Valves
> 
> Dear Mme. Kholoud,
> 
> I hope this email finds you well. I am writing to you on behalf of Algeria Industrie Solutions, a leading provider of oilfield products and services in Algeria. We are currently seeking your company's expertise in procuring 500 units of High Pressure Valves for our ongoing projects.
> 
> I would like to bring your attention to the current inflation rate in Algeria, which stands at 4.05%. Given this economic climate, we kindly request that you provide us with a competitive unit price for the High Pressure Valves in DZD (Algerian Dinar). This will enable us to make an informed decision regarding our procurement plans and ensure the best possible value for our investments.
> 
> We deeply appreciate your cooperation and would be grateful if you could expedite this request, as we are on a tight schedule for project execution. Please find below our contact details should you require any further information or have any questions.
> 
> Best Regards,
> 
> Khelfaoui Ramy
> Procurement Manager
> Algeria Industrie Solutions
> Phone: +213 550 123 456
> Email: khelfaoui.ramy@algeria-industrie.com
> Website: www.algeria-industrie.com
> 
> Footer:
> 
> Algeria Industrie Solutions is a leading Algerian company specializing in the provision of integrated solutions for the oil and gas industry. Our commitment to quality, safety, and environmental responsibility has positioned us as a trusted partner for numerous international companies operating in our region. Visit our website today to learn more about how we can help you achieve your business goals.

subject: Re: Sourcing Request: ArcelorMittal (Luxembourg)
content:
Hi Ramy, yes i accept your your offer and i give you a 2% discount

Le lun. 13 avr. 2026 à 21:22, <procurement.solutions259@gmail.com> a écrit :

>  Subject: Request for Competitive Quotation for 500 High Pressure Valves
>
> Dear Mr. Ramy,
>
> I hope this email finds you well. I am writing to you on behalf of Algeria
> Industrie Solutions, a leading provider of industrial solutions in Algeria.
>
> We are seeking your assistance with a significant order for 500 High
> Pressure Valves for an upcoming project we are undertaking. Given the
> nature and scale of our operations, we require your expertise and
> high-quality products to ensure the success of this project.
>
> I would like to draw your attention to the current inflation rate in
> Algeria, which stands at 4.05%. In light of this, I kindly request you to
> provide us with a competitive unit price for the High Pressure Valves in
> DZD (Algerian Dinar). This will allow us to plan our budget effectively and
> make an informed decision regarding our procurement.
>
> We value our relationship with ArcelorMittal and are confident that we can
> reach mutually beneficial terms for this order. I am looking forward to
> receiving your quotation at the earliest convenience.
>
> Please feel free to contact me directly if you have any questions or
> require additional information. I am always available to discuss further
> details about our project.
>
> Thank you in advance for your prompt attention to this matter. I look
> forward to a fruitful collaboration between our companies.
>
> Best regards,
>
> Khelfaoui Ramy
> Algeria Industrie Solutions
> Tel: +213 (0)555 123 4567
> Email: khelfaouiramy@algeria-industrie.com
> Website: www.algeria-industrie.com
> Footer: Algeria Industrie Solutions | Rue de la République, Algiers,
> Algeria | Tel: +213 (0)555 123 4567 | Email: [info@algeria-industrie.com
